api_key.description: Judge.me private, public, or OAuth API token. Sent as the X-Api-Token header.

shop_domain.description: The Shopify shop domain (for example example.myshopify.com). Sent as the shop_domain query parameter on every request.

base_url.description: Judge.me API base URL override for tests or proxies.

page_size.description: Records per page for legacy reviews/products/widgets streams (1-100).

product_id.description: Optional Judge.me product id for review/widget filters.

product_external_id.description: Optional external platform product id for widget lookups.

product_handle.description: Optional product handle for widget lookups.

review_id.description: Judge.me review id for the review detail stream.

reviewer_id.description: Judge.me reviewer id for reviewer detail and filters.

reviewer_external_id.description: Optional external platform reviewer id for reviewer detail lookups.

reviewer_email.description: Optional reviewer email for reviewer detail lookups.

widget_page.description: Optional page value for widget HTML endpoints that accept page.

widget_per_page.description: Optional per_page value for widget HTML endpoints that accept per_page.

widget_review_type.description: Optional review_type for reviews_tab and all_reviews_page widgets.

webhook_id.description: Judge.me webhook id for the webhook detail stream.

setting_keys.description: Optional setting key value for settings stream; sent as setting_keys[].

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
